variants.title: FilterFinder FF300887C Compressed Air Filter | Replaces the Domnick Hunter 100AR
variants.option1Value: FilterFinder FF300887C Compressed Air Filter | Replaces the Domnick Hunter 100AR
variants.description: The FF300887C is our FilterFinder Approved replacement to the Domnick Hunter 100AR. Our element is designed to meet or exceed the quality and performance of the original Domnick Hunter filter, ensuring superior filtration performance and long-lasting durability. Engineered with our polyester needle felt media and a durable design, the FF300887C provides reliable and consistent performance over its lifespan, even in harsh operating environments. With FilterFinder, you can trust that you are getting a reliable and high-quality replacement filter that will keep your system running smoothly.
specifications: Style: Compressed Air Filter, Media: Polyester Needle Felt, Outer Diameter: 83.0 mm, Inner Diameter: 49.0 mm, Length: 436.0 mm, Seal Material: Nitrile, Temperature Range: +1 - +80°C, Media Type: Polyester Needle Felt, Flow Direction: IN-OUT, Seal: Nitrile
